qa_pair.question: What is the season code for Fall 2024 on CourseTable?
What is the full title of the course listed as CPSC 365 in Fall 2024?
How many credits is CPSC 365 worth in Fall 2024?
Who are the two professors teaching CPSC 223 in Fall 2024? List both names separated by a comma.
What is the average student rating (rounded to one decimal place) of CPSC 365 in Fall 2024?
What Yale distributional area does ENGL 154 satisfy in Fall 2023?
Does ENGL 154 in Fall 2023 satisfy any Yale skill requirement? If so, which one?
What is the full title of PHIL 0050 offered in Spring 2025?
What is the earliest academic season available in CourseTable? Give the season label (e.g. "Fall 2009").
